crafting-window: I can upgrade your tools without the usual wait.
post-purchase-dialogue: Thanks. Your upgraded tool should be ready right away.
gmcm.section.upgrades.tooltip: Options for Clint's tool-upgrade cost and material requirements.
gmcm.price-multiplier.name: Upgrade Price
gmcm.price-multiplier.tooltip: Adjust Clint's tool upgrade gold cost from 0.10x to 5.00x the active tool upgrade data's base cost. Applies to vanilla and compatible modded tool upgrades.
gmcm.bars-required.name: Bars Required
gmcm.bars-required.tooltip: Adjust the bar cost for Clint's tool upgrades from 0 to 25 bars in 5-bar increments. Uses the active upgrade data's bar type for vanilla and compatible modded tool upgrades.
